prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年吉林大学在湖南物理类最低位次依次约8113→9540→16787→12053→10797名。2023年出现明显位次后移（16787），2024年回升至12053，2025年进一步前移至10797，近两年呈前移趋势，2025年基准约10797名；该校在湖南物理类招生计划2021年157人、2022年148人、2023年157人、2024年159人、2025年154人；2026年计划154人，与2025年持平，无扩招或缩招，招生规模对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 吉林大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第26名，近年排名稳定（2021年第24→2026年第26），属国内顶尖综合性大学；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及前卫校区校园安全事件（男生翻女生澡筐等），引发舆论关注，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第40位（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达15个，包括马克思主义理论A+、考古学A+、化学A、法学A、数学A、机械工程A、物理学A、兽医学A、计算机科学与技术A-、电子科学与技术A-等，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等吉林大学优势工科专业社会热度持续偏热至高热；临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业热度稳定偏热。湖南省2026年物理类考生约347000人，较2025年320192人增加约8.4%，考生规模扩大使竞争加剧。；吉林大学位于吉林省长春市，属东北地区，对湖南考生而言属跨省就读，地域偏好上南方考生对东北高校存在一定距离顾虑，但985层次可部分抵消地域影响。该校在湖南招生人数占其全国总招生比例约2.5%左右（2024年数据），非主要生源省。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年前移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、湖南省物理类考生增加约8.4%使竞争加剧、声誉负面事件可能抑制部分报考意愿、优势学科对高分考生仍有吸引力等因素，在2025年基准10797名基础上预计竞争略加剧，预测最低位次约10597名，区间10097–11097名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings of Jilin University in Hunan Physics Category were approximately 8113 → 9540 → 16787 → 12053 → 10797. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (16787), rebounding to 12053 in 2024, and further advancing to 10797 in 2025, showing a forward trend in the last two years, with a baseline of about 10797 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Jilin University in Hunan Physics Category was 157 in 2021, 148 in 2022, 157 in 2023, 159 in 2024, and 154 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 154, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, and the enrollment scale has a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 26th, with stable rankings in recent years (24th in 2021 → 26th in 2026), belonging to top-tier comprehensive universities in China. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is significantly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents at the Qianwei campus (e.g., male students peeping into female shower baskets), which has sparked public attention and may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 40th (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 15 disciplines rated A- or above, including Marxist Theory A+, Archaeology A+, Chemistry A, Law A, Mathematics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Physics A, Veterinary Medicine A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Electronic Science and Technology A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Jilin University's advantageous engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have sustained high to very high social popularity. Medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have stable and relatively high popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,192 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Jilin University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, in the Northeast region. For Hunan candidates, this is an inter-provincial study, and there is some geographical concern among southern candidates about universities in the Northeast, but the 985 level can partially offset the geographical impact. The number of students enrolled in Hunan accounts for about 2.5% of its total national enrollment (2024 data), making it a non-primary source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend in historical rankings over the last two years, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the increase of about 8.4% in Hunan Physics Category candidates intensifying competition, the negative reputation events potentially suppressing some application willingness, and the strong appeal of advantageous disciplines to high-scoring candidates, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 10797. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10597, with a range of 10097 to 11097.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10097–11097, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 10097), focus on Tier 1 flagship majors such as Clinical Medicine 5+3, Law, and Computer Science. If the ranking is near the upper limit (around 11097), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety options and moderately apply for Tier 2 majors. Jilin University has a wide range of disciplines, with strong engineering and medical fields. It is recommended to choose based on personal interests and discipline evaluation levels.

The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1985. The enrollment plan for this university in Hunan History Category was 14 students in 2021, 14 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 23 in 2024, and 23 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 25 students, an increase of 2 students (about 8.7% expansion) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is significantly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents at the Qianwei Campus, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 40th (relatively hot), with medium to high exposure on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 15 disciplines rated A- or above, including Law (A), Archaeology (A+), and Marxist Theory (A+), which are directly related to History Category majors, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively hot social popularity, Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese is recommended, and Journalism and Communication is significantly discouraged. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Hunan Province is approximately 187,000, an increase of about 31.2% compared to 142,547 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition due to the large expansion of examinee numbers. Jilin University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, which is an inter-provincial study for Hunan candidates. There is some geographical distance concern among southern candidates for the Northeast region, but the 985 level can partially offset this. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in historical rankings in 2025, the small expansion of about 8.7% in 2026, the substantial increase of about 31.2% in History Category examinees in Hunan Province significantly intensifying competition, and the negative reputation events that may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply, competition is expected to intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 1985.
